series_metadata.series_title: Interstate Compact for the Placement of Children
series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the placement of childrenwithin and outside the State of Ohio for adoption, foster care or residentialtreatment. Case files include: Interstate Compact Placement Request 100-A (JFS01661); Interstate Compact Placement Report on Child’s Placement Status 100-B(JFS 01662); Interstate Compact Transmittal (JFS 01640); Statement of Assurance(ODHS 1674); and Social and Medical History-Biological Mother and Father(ODHS 1616) BCII, FBI Central Registry, references, psychological, JFS 1653Medical statements and all other homestudy documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: microfilm or CD inoffice permanently. ; Paper: 60 days afterhardcopy is prepped,scanned, indexed (imaged)and quality control iscomplete
